text_excerpt: In Parliament | Iain Duncan Smith Skip to main content Main navigation About Iain Duncan Smith Campaigns News In Parliament Events Contact In Parliament Tweet Here, you can find Iain Duncan Smith's speeches and appearances in Parliament (provided by theyworkforyou): Lord Mandelson | Foreign, Commonwealth and Development Office | Written Answers To ask the Secretary of State for Foreign, Commonwealth and Development Affairs, whether Peter Mandelson had access to the China audit at an Air Ambulance Services: Fuels | Department of Health and Social Care | Written Answers To ask the Secretary of State for Health and Social Care, that the sector is appropriately reflected within wider emergency planning and res Air Ambulance Services: Fuels | Department of Health and Social Care | Written Answers To ask the Secretary of State for Health and Social Care, that air ambulance charities are formally included within national fuel resilience Air Ambulance Services: Fuels | Department of Health and Social Care | Written Answers To ask the Secretary of State for Health and Social Care, that the recognition of air ambulance services within NHS emergency services fuel Xinjiang: Human Rights | Foreign, Commonwealth and Development Office | Written Answers To ask the Secretary of State for Foreign, Commonwealth and Development Affairs, what steps she is taking in response to the House of Common Xinjiang: Human Rights | Foreign, Commonwealth and Development Office | Written Answers To ask the Secretary of State for Foreign, Commonwealth and Development Affairs, what assessment he has made of the (a) effectiveness and (b Northern Ireland Troubles Bill (Carry-over) | Commons debates In the limited time I have, I say to the Secretary of State that this Bill was bad, and it is now a mess. Northern Ireland Troubles Bill (Carry-over) | Commons debates I will, but briefly, because I do not get any extra time. Northern Ireland Troubles Bill (Carry-over) | Commons debates It is astonishing. My right hon. Friend is exactly right. Northern Ireland Troubles Bill (Carry-over) | Commons debates We will not altogether agree about this issue.
